ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "met_health_objective" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the county has met the health objective */,
  "age_adjusted_death_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted death rate per 100,000 population */,
  "lower_95_ci" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the death rate */,
  "upper_95_ci" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the death rate */,
  "average_annual_count" INTEGER /* Average annual count of deaths */,
  "recent_trend" TEXT /* Recent trend in death rates */,
  "recent_5_year_trend" REAL /* Recent 5-year trend in death rates */,
  "5yr_lower_95_ci" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the 5-year trend */,
  "5yr_upper_95_ci" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the 5-year trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county for the given year */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the deceased */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the deceased */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical area (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "health_objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health objective */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for the health objective */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the health objective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the health objective */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value to be achieved */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the health objective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the health objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider, policymaker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_information" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "healthcare_access_index" REAL /* Healthcare access index of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)
column_names: Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county
Indicator of whether the county has met the health objective

Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin)
